Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 131 

RESP_CARE_FAC_TXNMY_IND 

LABEL: Respite Care Facility Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the respite care facility provider category; 
ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: RESP_CARE_FAC_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: RESP_CARE_FAC_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base
